title: The Original Creation
body:
# Welcome to The Original Creation! 
This modpack blends the powers of Origins and Create, offering diverse character backgrounds and boundless engineering possibilities. Let's dive in to explore these core mods further in the following texts.

# Origins:
The Origins mod expands the Minecraft experience by offering players various character backgrounds known as "Origins." Each origin grants the player unique abilities and traits that influence gameplay. From elves gliding through treetops to golems with incredible strength, Origins provides a wide range of player experiences, allowing players to explore the world of Minecraft in exciting new ways.

**Here you can see some of the base classes of the Origins mod:**
![Base clases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/df4HC3V0/images/0bb0516b460880643caea220a37e0b9beaae75ae.png)
Source: [Origins modpage](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)

# Create:
The Create mod revolutionizes engineering in Minecraft by introducing a plethora of new blocks and mechanisms that empower players to construct intricate mechanical systems and automations. From crafting windmills and factories to designing elevators and conveyor belts, Create unleashes a world of endless creativity where motion and energy become the building blocks of innovation, enabling players to shape and automate their Minecraft worlds like never before.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rR8W-f9YhYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Summing up, The Original Creation modpack presents a captivating fusion of the creative potential of the Create mod with the unique origins of the Origins mod.** 
### Enjoy exploring and playing
